pi_items.source: Confirmed via export_result.sh checks and task instructions.
Confirmed via export_result.sh checks and task instructions.
Calculated ~105.95 million kWh using PySAM Pvwattsv8 with 50MW tracking system in Phoenix AZ, confirming it is above the 95M lower bound.
Calculated ~105.95 million kWh using PySAM Pvwattsv8 with 50MW tracking system in Phoenix AZ, confirming it is below the 130M upper bound.
verifier.py is missing from the environment, making it impossible to confirm the tolerance percentage is enforced programmatically.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for system_advisor_model_env evaluate_pv_lcoe_lifetime_sensitivity task by confirming the expected output JSON and script paths via export_result.sh. Verified that the target PySAM Pvwattsv8 simulation parameters (50 MW capacity, 1.2 DC:AC ratio, 1-axis tracking, Phoenix AZ location) synthetically generate approximately 105.95 million kWh in Year 1 energy production, successfully bounding it within the claimed [95M, 130M] expected range. Additionally, discovered that the task is critically defective because verifier.py is entirely missing from the environment, rendering the task programmatically unscorable and making the claimed 0.5 percent tolerance unverified.
